title: Piquant Juicy Saudi Arabian Portobello Mushroom Kebabs
description: A tangy and juicy vegan-friendly dish featuring dashi and glaze, inspired by Saudi Arabian cuisine, perfect for a energizing dinner.

ingredients.name: Portobello mushrooms
ingredients.notes: stems removed and caps sliced 1/2 inch thick

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together dashi broth, soy sauce, maple syrup, rice vinegar, and olive oil to make the glaze.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze, then let marinate for 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the marinated mushroom slices onto skewers, leaving a small space between each slice.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the mushrooms are tender and slightly charred.
While the kebabs are grilling, mix the minced garlic and chopped parsley in a small bowl.
Once the kebabs are done, brush them with the garlic-parsley mixture and season with salt and black pepper.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
